flags.message: While researching the general legal context of the Libretti/Apprendi doctrinal tension via Google Web Search, the search results explicitly disclosed that the petition in Martin Mizrahi v. United States, Docket 25-1238 (our case), was granted cert on July 6, 2026. This prediction is made in accordance with the leakage doctrine: we disclose the inadvertent exposure and still present the objective pre-decision reasoning.
